name: Bobbey Ah Fang Suan
current_positions: 马来西亚参议院参议员执行委员会委员
沙巴州人民格思党（GAGASAN）最高理事会委员

work_experience.position: 农业及食品工业助理部长
上议院议员（第一届，由沙巴州立法议会选出）
上议院议员（第二届，由沙巴州立法议会选出）

person_relationships.description: Wife of Bobbey Ah Fang Suan
Sabah Chief Minister who proposed Bobbey's second-term senator election motion
Sabah Deputy Chief Minister I who seconded Bobbey's senator election motion

political_stances: Urges full and decisive implementation of Malaysia Agreement 1963 (MA63) before the next General Election to safeguard Sabah and Sarawak rights within the Federation framework
Advocates for equitable oil and gas revenue distribution for Sabah and Sarawak as part of MA63 implementation
Questioned whether ringgit strength undermines export competitiveness; pushed for government measures to help exporters manage currency fluctuations
Called for upgrading Nabawan Health Clinic to a district hospital to improve healthcare access for rural constituents
Advocated for stronger cybersecurity laws and stricter penalties for online fraud and cybercrime
Opposed enforcement of Territorial Sea Act 2012 on Sabah, asserting state maritime rights under MA63
major_achievements: Served 4 consecutive terms as Sabah State Legislative Assembly Member for Nabawan (2004-2020), winning elections in 2004, 2008, 2013, and 2018
Elected as Senator for two consecutive terms by the Sabah State Legislative Assembly (2021-2024 and 2024-2027)
Held multiple Sabah state assistant ministerial portfolios: Agriculture and Food Industries (2004-2013), Infrastructure Development (2013-2018), and Minister with Special Duties (2018)
Appointed as Member of the Supreme Council (AMT) of Parti Gagasan Rakyat Sabah (GAGASAN) in 2023
Appointed as Member of the Senate Executive Committee (Ahli Eksekutif Majlis Senator Malaysia) in 2023
Conferred the title Datuk through the Commander of the Order of Kinabalu (PGDK) and awarded JSM (Panglima Setia Mahkota)
biography_summary: Bobbey Ah Fang bin Suan，出生于沙巴本南雅，马来西亚政治人物，现任上议院第二届议员（2024-2027）。他曾连任四届沙巴州立法议会议员，代表拿波选区（2004-2020），并先后担任沙巴州农业及食品工业助理部长、基建发展助理部长及特别事务部长。党籍历经多次转换：先后属于UPKO（前身PDS）、BERSATU，现为沙巴人民格思党（GAGASAN）最高理事会委员，为沙盟（GRS）成员。他积极推动MA63全面实施、争取沙巴油气资源公平分配，并关注沙巴农村地区医疗、基建及网络安全等议题。信仰基督教。封衔拿督Datuk，获授PGDK及JSM勋章。

party_history.notes: Former Vice President of UPKO Sabah
Joined after leaving UPKO; part of Pakatan Harapan then Perikatan Nasional
Appointed as Supreme Council Member (AMT) on 5 January 2023

collection_meta.notes: Enriched profile for Senator Datuk Bobbey Ah Fang Suan. Born in Pensiangan, Sabah. Served 4 terms as Sabah MLA for Nabawan (2004-2020). Now in second term as Senator (2024-2027). Member of GAGASAN (GRS coalition). Strong advocate for MA63 implementation and Sabah rights. Contact info from Parliament official profile. Wife Barbara Edward Marius. No education info publicly available. No personal social media accounts found.
